items.title: Seaborn sits on Matplotlib and pandas
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  df["pandas DataFrame"] --> sns["Seaborn API"]
  sns --> mpl["Matplotlib Figure and Axes"]
  mpl --> out["PNG / screen / notebook"]
items.caption: You pass tabular data to Seaborn; it constructs Matplotlib artists you can still customize or save.

items.title: Choosing a Seaborn plot family
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  start["What do you want to see?"] --> one["One variable distribution"]
  start --> two["Two numeric variables"]
  start --> group["Compare categories"]
  start --> many["All pairwise numeric"]
  start --> corr["Correlation matrix"]
  one --> histplot["histplot / displot"]
  two --> scatter["scatterplot / regplot"]
  group --> cat["boxplot / violinplot / catplot"]
  many --> pair["pairplot"]
  corr --> heat["heatmap on corr()"]
items.caption: Match the plotting function to your analytical question— distributions, relationships, groups, pairs, or correlations.
